title: centaurea × caulescens
intro: Centaurea × caulescens, also known as a hybrid thistle, is a cross between the Centaurea montana and Centaurea scabiosa species of flowering plants in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea × caulescens include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Centaurea × caulescens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
